reference: SO GO THOU TO THY STATION AND IF THOU AGAIN MEET ANY ONE AFTER THIS HOUR RECITING AUGHT OF POETRY WHETHER HE BE NEAR OR FAR IT WILL BE I OR SOME ONE I KNOW AND THOU SHALT NOT LEARN OF HIM BUT BY ME
text: So go thou to thy station, and if thou again meet anyone after this hour reciting aught of poetry, whether he be near or far, it will be I or someone I know, and thou shalt not learn of him but by me.
